ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (country, state/province, city) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the station (urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was decommissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (pollutant, meteorological) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (integer, float, string) */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for unit conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the measurement was taken */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (pending, processed, validated) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata (e.g., data quality flag) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of the metadata (data quality, instrument) */,
  "metadata_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (organization, institution) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_parameters" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurements for the parameter at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_measurements" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "instrument_setting" TEXT /* Settings used for the instrument during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_note" TEXT /* Note about the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_logs" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_description" TEXT /* Description of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_logs" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
